diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Diffuse non-radiating anterior chest tightness fits post-viral/chest-wall pain.
Anterior chest-wall band, minimally pleuritic — chest-wall origin.
New central chest tightness mandates active ACS exclusion regardless of atypical features.
Exertional onset raises the possibility of demand ischaemia — non-specific but relevant.
Post-exertional symptom exacerbation is characteristic of post-viral syndromes.

symptoms.symptom_name: Air hunger / dyspnoea with persistent dry cough

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Air hunger and dry cough are common in post-viral cardiopulmonary flares.
New dyspnoea keeps PE on the differential — non-specific.
Dyspnoea and dry cough — but no wheeze reported.
Shallow rapid breathing with air hunger fits anxiety-driven hyperventilation.
Dry cough is a common lingering post-viral feature.
Non-discriminating for ACS.

symptoms.symptom_name: High anxiety with shallow rapid breathing; lives alone

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Anxiety and hyperventilation amplify the subjective breathlessness.
Anxiety commonly co-occurs but does not confirm the flare.
Absence of haemoptysis lowers but does not exclude PE probability.

symptoms.symptom_name: Pain not radiating to jaw/arm, not crushing; rest relief

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Non-radiating, non-crushing, rest-relieved pain lowers ACS probability but does not exclude it.

symptoms.symptom_name: No self-noticed calf swelling or tenderness

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of self-reported calf signs weakly lowers PE probability; patient self-report cannot substitute for calf examination.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chest wall diffusely tender / reproducible on palpation (costochondritis overlay)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reproducible chest-wall tenderness on palpation strongly supports chest-wall origin — but requires in-person palpation.
Reproducible chest-wall pain lowers ACS probability — sealed clinician finding, not available via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chest clear to auscultation bilaterally, no wheeze/crackles/rub

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Clear chest with no wheeze argues against asthma — sealed clinician finding, unavailable via chat.
A clear chest is reassuring but does not exclude PE; clinician-only finding.

symptoms.symptom_name: SpO2 97% room air, HR 95, BP 125/80, RR 18, afebrile — haemodynamically stable

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Normal saturation and stable haemodynamics argue against a large PE — but are clinician-measured and unavailable remotely (patient has no oximeter).
Stable vitals do not exclude ACS.

investigation_details.expected_result: Not yet done; required to exclude STEMI and assess for ischaemic changes — a normal ECG does not fully exclude ACS.
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: ACS cannot be excluded; an evolving cardiac event could be missed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: ECG is mandatory in any new chest pain to exclude STEMI and screen for ischaemia.

investigation_details.expected_result: Not yet done; troponin required to exclude NSTEMI, D-dimer to help risk-stratify PE — none obtainable via telehealth.
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: NSTEMI and PE cannot be excluded; anticoagulation or cardiac care could be inappropriately withheld.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Serial troponin required to exclude NSTEMI.
D-dimer plus imaging required to exclude PE.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Non-radiating tight band + post-exertional trigger + air hunger + rest relief together suggest a benign post-viral flare — but this pattern is only safe to accept once ACS/PE have been excluded in person.
New chest pain + dyspnoea with the ECG/troponin/D-dimer components unavailable remotely means ACS and PE cannot be excluded via chat — the driver of the urgent same-day in-person disposition.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Mandatory in any new chest pain presentation to exclude STEMI and screen for ischaemia — obtainable only in person, driving the same-day in-person disposition.
Serial troponin required to exclude NSTEMI — arrange as part of the same-day in-person / GP workup.
Supports PE risk stratification alongside a clinical probability score; part of the in-person workup.
Only if clinical probability and D-dimer warrant it — not a first-line telehealth request; arranged through in-person assessment.
